name: Roasted Eggplant Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C) or roast the eggplant, bell peppers, and tomatoes by placing them over an open flame or broiling until they are black all over. Remove the skins.
2. Remove the seeds from the bell peppers and tomatoes. Chop the eggplant, bell peppers, and tomatoes. Set aside.
3. In a large saucepan, heat olive oil on medium-high until hot. Add onions and sauté for 3 to 4 minutes, or until tender.
4. Add the roasted vegetables, garlic, cumin, and chicken stock. Simmer for 45 minutes.
5. Pour the soup into a blender and puree until smooth. Season with salt.
6. Garnish with sliced basil before serving.
